message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title dwb critics class map

class TrajectoryCritic

class MapGridCritic
class CostmapQueue
class PreferForwardCritic
class RotateToGoalCritic
class TwirlingCritic
class OscillationCritic
class BaseObstacleCritic

class GoalDistCritic
class PathDistCritic
class MapGridQueue

class GoalAlignCritic
class PathAlignCritic

class CommandTrend
class ObstacleFootprintCritic

MapGridCritic --|> TrajectoryCritic
CostmapQueue --|> TrajectoryCritic
PreferForwardCritic --|> TrajectoryCritic
RotateToGoalCritic --|> TrajectoryCritic
TwirlingCritic --|> TrajectoryCritic
OscillationCritic --|> TrajectoryCritic
BaseObstacleCritic --|> TrajectoryCritic

GoalDistCritic --|> MapGridCritic
PathDistCritic --|> MapGridCritic
MapGridQueue --x MapGridCritic

GoalAlignCritic --|> GoalDistCritic
PathAlignCritic --|> GoalDistCritic

CommandTrend --o OscillationCritic

ObstacleFootprintCritic --|> BaseObstacleCritic

@enduml
```
